candidates.title: 6-pattern orchestration taxonomy for AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md
candidates.description: Parallel Specialists, Pipeline, Swarm, Research+Implementation, Plan Approval, Coordinated Refactoring. Compare against existing patterns in AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md and identify which patterns your skills use implicitly but haven't named.
candidates.extraction_action: Map each pattern to existing skill usage: deep-research=Research+Impl, skill-audit=Plan Approval, code-reviewer=Parallel Specialists. Identify unnamed patterns.

candidates.title: Spawn backend comparison for T5 worktree management
candidates.description: in-process (hidden, fastest), tmux (visible, persistent), iterm2 (macOS split). Auto-detection logic. Directly relevant to T5 worktree management and parallel CC instance strategies.
candidates.extraction_action: Update T5 worktree management todo with backend comparison. Test tmux backend for visible parallel agent execution.

candidates.title: TeammateTool 13-operation reference for agent team definitions
candidates.description: Full operation lifecycle for persistent teams. Compare against your .claude/teams/ definitions — are you using all available operations? Are your teams missing shutdown/cleanup protocols?
candidates.extraction_action: Audit .claude/teams/ against the 13 operations. Check if audit-review-team and research-plan-team use requestShutdown/cleanup.

candidates.title: Task dependency auto-unblock for skill pipeline design
candidates.description: Declarative task dependencies via blockedBy arrays. Auto-unblock on completion. Could replace manual orchestration in multi-phase skills like deep-research and repo-synthesis.
candidates.extraction_action: Evaluate whether deep-research phases (searcher -> synthesizer -> verifier) could use TaskCreate with blockedBy instead of manual sequential dispatch.

candidates.title: Subagent vs teammate decision framework
candidates.description: Short-lived focused work = subagent (Task tool alone). Persistent coordination with messaging = teammate (Task + team). Clear decision criteria for when to use which.
candidates.extraction_action: Add to AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md as a decision framework. Currently your skills use subagents exclusively — evaluate whether any workflows benefit from persistent teammates.
